signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (vs 2.0% Feb, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

South Korea's Statistics Korea confirmed March 2026 consumer price inflation rose to **2.2% year-on-year**, driven by oil prices but tempered by government fuel caps and vouchers, with monthly +0.3% (below 0.6% expected); core inflation dipped to 2.2% YoY[1][2]. This be
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
